channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Navy Members Charged in Bedford Basin Death
item.description: Two members of the Royal Canadian Navy are facing charges in connection with the death of a fellow sailor in Bedford Basin, Nova Scotia. The charges stem from an incident that occurred recently, and t...

item.title: Nepal starts year 2083 with political calm but economic worries persist
item.description: Nepal don start the new year 2083 for Bikram Sambat calendar with political stability after some recent elections and government formation. Dis stability fit reduce wahala wey dey normally disturb eco...

item.title: Tanzania prepares to increase Chinese tourist visits with improved services
item.description: Tanzania is positioning itself to attract more Chinese tourists as African nations aim to tap into the world’s largest outbound travel market. During the World Travel Market Africa 2026, the country h...

item.title: Altered Image Misleads Public About Former President Uhuru Kenyatta's Health
item.description: A photo that seems to show former Kenyan President Uhuru Kenyatta in a wheelchair has been circulating on social media, causing concern among some Kenyans. The image claims that Kenyatta's health is d...

item.title: Mile Hi Group Submits Complaints to Ombudsman Over Camp John Hay Closures and Lease Disputes
item.description: Baguio City – The Mile Hi group has formally lodged three separate complaints with the Office of the Ombudsman against Manjit T. Singh Reandi, president and CEO of John Hay Management Corporation (JHM...

item.title: ACF Warns Nigeria’s Insecurity Has Reached Critical Level
item.description: The Arewa Consultative Forum (ACF) don yan say di security wahala wey dey happen for Nigeria don reach level wey e fit be called 'state of war'. Di ACF dey urge di Federal Government make dem shift im...

item.title: San Juan secures unexpected victory for Biñan against Batangas in WMPBL
item.description: In an exciting match of the Women's Maharlika Pilipinas Basketball League (WMPBL), San Juan led Biñan to a surprising victory over Batangas. The game, held on April 16, 2026, showcased strong performa...

item.title: Nigeria's Headline Inflation Rises to 15.38% in March 2026, Ending 11-Month Decline
item.description: According to the latest report from the National Bureau of Statistics (NBS) released on Wednesday, Nigeria's annual headline inflation rate increased slightly to 15.38 percent in March 2026, up from 1...

item.title: Albanese Government boosts defence budget to $53 billion by 2033
item.description: The Albanese Government has announced a significant increase in Australia’s defence spending, committing an extra $14 billion over the next four years and an estimated $53 billion over the coming deca...

item.title: Federal Budget Faces Pressure Amid Inflation and Global Oil Shock
item.description: The editorial discusses the mounting pressures confronting Australia’s Federal Budget as global economic turmoil intensifies. Pandemic-era stimulus spending created an ongoing public expectation for g...

item.title: Home Secretary vows legal action against advisers facilitating false asylum claims
item.description: Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood has pledged to take strong legal action against law firms and advisers who exploit the UK's asylum system by assisting migrants to fabricate claims, particularly those p...

item.title: UK job applicants increasingly encounter AI interviewers
item.description: In the UK, a growing number of job seekers are experiencing interviews conducted by artificial intelligence (AI) rather than human recruiters. Companies are increasingly adopting AI-powered tools to s...

item.title: Long-running Rinehart litigation recalls WA’s Bell Group legal saga
item.description: The Financial Review’s report draws parallels between the drawn-out Rinehart litigation and Western Australia’s infamous Bell Group case, a decades-long legal battle that dominated the state’s courts ...

item.title: ELRC annuls HOD appointment after qualification dispute at Khowa school
item.description: The Education Labour Relations Council (ELRC) has nullified the appointment of Veliswa Ngcingane as head of department at Siyahlangula Primary School in Khowa, following a dispute over her qualificati...

item.title: Albanese government plans to raise defence spending to 3% of GDP using NATO-style accounting
item.description: The Albanese government is set to announce a significant increase in Australia's defence spending, aiming for approximately 3% of GDP by 2033, according to the 2026 National Defence Strategy. Defence ...

item.title: WA Government fast-tracks renewable and green industrial projects under new development laws
item.description: The Cook government has announced the first five projects to gain priority status under Western Australia’s recently enacted State Development Act, marking a major step in its plan to accelerate renew...

item.title: Government Spokesperson Msigwa Urges Tanzanian Media to Uphold Peace and National Unity
item.description: The Permanent Secretary in the Ministry of Information, Culture, Arts and Sports, who also serves as the Government Chief Spokesperson, Gerson Msigwa, has appealed to media practitioners in Tanzania t...

item.title: Seven Convicted in Odisha for Supplying Fake SIM Cards and OTPs to Pakistani Intelligence
item.description: On Wednesday, a sessions court in Bhubaneswar convicted seven individuals, including five from Odisha, for procuring SIM cards using fake identities and sharing one-time passwords (OTPs) with Pakistan...

item.title: Bayern Munich host Real Madrid in Champions League quarter-final second leg
item.description: Real Madrid travel to Bayern Munich for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final, needing to overturn a 2-1 deficit from the first leg. Bayern Munich claimed a narrow advantage at the Sa...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Preparing for Microsoft Certifications AZ-303 and AZ-204
item.description: For anybody wey dey pursue IT career, Microsoft certifications don become serious validation for skills and fit help you stand out for job market. Certifications like Azure Solutions Architect (AZ-303...
